sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO orders (member_id, order_date, status, total_price, pay_method, pg_tid, approval_no, zipcode, address) VALUES (#memberId#, #orderDate#, #status#, #totalPrice#, #payMethod#, #pgTid#, #approvalNo#, #zipcode#, #address#)
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
INSERT INTO order_item (order_id, option_id, qty, unit_price) VALUES (#orderId#, #optionId#, #qty#, #unitPrice#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT order_id, member_id, order_date, status, total_price, pay_method, pg_tid, approval_no, zipcode, address FROM orders WHERE order_id = #orderId#
SELECT order_item_id, order_id, option_id, qty, unit_price FROM order_item WHERE order_id = #orderId#

SELECT o.order_id, o.order_date, o.status, o.total_price, p.name AS product_name, po.option_name, oi.qty, oi.unit_price FROM orders o JOIN order_item oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN product_option po ON oi.option_id = po.option_id JOIN product p ON po.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.member_id = #memberId# ORDER BY o.order_id DESC LIMIT #size# OFFSET #offset#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE member_id = #memberId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO order_settlement (order_id, item_total, discount, use_point, pay_amount, shipping_fee, vat, grand_total, reg_date) VALUES (#orderId#, #itemTotal#, #discount#, #usePoint#, #payAmount#, #shippingFee#, #vat#, #grandTotal#, #regDate#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT order_id, item_total, discount, use_point, pay_amount, shipping_fee, vat, grand_total, reg_date FROM order_settlement WHERE order_id = #orderId#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o JOIN order_item oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN product_option po ON oi.option_id = po.option_id WHERE o.member_id = #memberId# AND po.product_id = #productId# AND o.status = 2
